title: Nippon Ant Bait Station Twin Pack, Pre-Baited, Suitable For Indoor & Outdoor Use, Tamper Resistant And Mess Free, Kills Ants And Their Nest, Trusted For Over 50 Years (packaging may vary)
features: CLEAN AND SIMPLE ANT CONTROL: A ready-to-use liquid insecticide bait, Nippon Ant Bait Station is perfect for anyone looking for a clean and simple solution to their ant problem.
INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: Fully enclosed, Nippon Ant Bait Station can be used both indoors and outdoors, ideal for combating infestations around domestic premises or out-houses/greenhouses.
KILLS ANTS AND THEIR NESTS: The Nippon Ant Bait Station acts to kill ants and their nests, eliminating them without mess or trace.
CONTAINS SPINOSAD: The active ingredient spinosad effectively spreads throughout the whole colony, stopping ants in their tracks and destroying the complete nest.

EASY AND ENCLOSED: Unlike sprays and other liquid solutions, Nippon Ant Bait Station is totally enclosed and easy to use. Always read the label and product information before use and dispose of responsibly. Keep out of reach of children.
